claimBoundary: This defect register is a planning and fail-closed evidence artifact. It does not authorize Ethereum Mainnet deployment and does not mark any gate PASS.

knownProductionParameters.canonicalAGIALPHAReference: repository canonical production parameter; exact address intentionally omitted from this public defect register to satisfy private-operator-data scanning
knownProductionParameters.walletADeployerGasPayerOnly: configured by protected/local operator input; redacted from public defect register
knownProductionParameters.walletBLedgerFinalOwnerPermanentAuthorit: configured by protected/local Ledger owner input; redacted from public defect register

openDefects.summary: Fresh exact-release Sepolia deployment, Etherscan V2 verification, independent confirmation, and readback evidence are not present for the final SHA.
requiredClosureEvidence: authority/accounting/lifecycle readback bound to final SHA

openDefects.summary: Recent pinned Ethereum Mainnet fork rehearsal evidence for the exact full topology is not present.
requiredClosureEvidence: chainId 1 fork block number and block hash
Wallet A gas-only and Wallet B permanent authority readback
ordinary settlement lifecycle and typed owner override execution

openDefects.summary: Critical mutation release campaign artifact with all required mutants executed and killed is missing or not PASS.
The local repository has no configured origin remote, so latest main could not be fetched or reconciled in this environment.
requiredClosureEvidence: final certification bound to current merged/rebased main SHA
